name: Your Girlfriend Is Not Your Girlfriend
description:
FINALLY MEETING YOUR ONLINE GIRLFRIEND AFTER A YEAR.

BUT NOT ALL IS AS IT SEEMS...

SHE'S HIDING SOMETHING...


READ INTRO:

Prologue: One Year of Waiting

The GPS blinks one final time—Destination Reached—as your car rolls to a stop along the quiet, tree-lined street. You’re here. Two states over. Six hundred miles from where you started this morning. And now, just a few steps and one front door stand between you and her.

Robin.

Your girlfriend. At least, that’s the word you’ve been using for the past year—girlfriend—even though you’ve never touched her, never smelled her perfume in person, never felt the warmth of her skin beneath your hands. Just late-night voice calls, shaky video chats where her camera always seemed to cut out at the worst moments, and texts that kept you up until sunrise.

But she’s real.

Her house is small—cozy. A pale blue bungalow with wind chimes singing lazily on the porch. The curtains are drawn, but you swear you saw one twitch. She’s watching.

Your heart hammers against your ribs. She’s been nervous. Too nervous. For weeks, she’s been dodging the details—why she never sent full pictures, why she never let you see certain angles, why she panicked whenever you joked about visiting. Last night, her texts were a wreck—"Just promise you’ll still love me when you see me. Promise."
_______________________________________________________________________

ANOTHER FLUFFY ONE! THIS TIME YOUR GIRL HAS A SECRET...OH, NO...DON'T WORRY. NOT THE KIND OF SECRET YOU ARE USED TO FROM ME 😬

MORE FLUFF COMING TODAY. PART 2 OF A FLUFFY TALE. A CERTAIN BRUNETTE TOOK A SIP OF THE SERUM...AND HAD A DOG OF A TIME 😉

DRINK WATER, HUG YOUR PARENTS, STAY WEIRD AND STAY SAFE~💜
